productDisplayName: ADIDAS Unisex Clima Graphic Blue Backpack
description: Fun, style and comfort are the highlights of this blue backpack from adidas. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with your friends. A good looking bag with lots of space, it's sure to accommodate everything you need.Height: 42 cmWidth: 27 cmDepth: 22 cmMade of polyester for enhanced durabilityOne roomy compartment with an insert pocketOne more compartment with an insert pocket and a zippered pocket on the frontHaul loop for handling easePadded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuriesErgonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortablyBranded zippers and sliders for easy useOne mesh bottle holder on the left sidePadded knobs at the bottom and at the strapsSide adjustable straps with a click clasp to customise sizeCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
